title: clean my house
description: We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented individual to clean our home on a regular basis. Responsibilities include dusting, vacuuming, mopping floors, cleaning bathrooms, kitchen surfaces, and appliances, and organizing living spaces. Additional tasks may include laundry and window cleaning as needed. Ideal candidates should have previous cleaning experience, strong time management skills, and the ability to work independently. A flexible schedule and attention to detail are essential. If you take pride in creating a clean and welcoming environment, we would love to hear from you. Competitive pay based on experience.
